Verify recent transaction list is displayed correctly on page load.
Verify all required column headers are displayed correctly.
Verify transaction type displays correctly as Payout/Wager with provider name.
Verify payout amount is displayed as a positive value.
Verify wager amount is displayed with a minus sign.
Verify tapping the Tlog icon opens the transaction detailed view.
Verify tapping the Back button redirects the user to the Transaction Summary page.
Verify tapping the Refresh icon reloads the latest transaction data.

Verify user is able to navigate transaction pages using Previous pagination button.

Verify filter prompt is accessible and displayed correctly.
Verify selected filters persist after navigating back to the Transaction Summary page.
Verify Continue button functions correctly on the filter prompt.
Verify Reset button clears all selected filters on the filter prompt.
Verify Close button dismisses the filter prompt without applying changes.
Verify calendar allows selection of dates only within the last 30 days.
Verify default days duration options are displayed correctly.
Verify selecting the “Last Week” option sets the correct date range.
Verify selecting the “Last 14 Days” option sets the correct date range.
Verify selecting the “Last 30 Days” option sets the correct date range.
Verify user is able to manually change the selected start and end dates.
Verify transaction list updates according to the selected date range filter.
Verify Reset button clears the selected calendar date range.
Verify appropriate error message is displayed when no transactions are available for the selected date range.
Verify “Show Only Payout” toggle activates when only “Payout” is selected from transaction type dropdown.
Verify “Show Only Payout” toggle deactivates when another filter type is selected along with “Payout”.
Verify “Show Only Payout” toggle is deactivates when “Payout” is deselected.
Verify Filter by Type dropdown displays “All” by default when no transaction type is selected.
Verify Reset button clears all selected transaction types from the dropdown.
Verify user is able to remove selected filter tags successfully.
Verify transaction count is displayed correctly on the dropdown.
Verify dropdown displays “All” text when all transaction types are selected.
